=== setlist info.txt
===================
===================
===================

Bob Dylan
Sun Theatre
Anaheim, Ca

March 10, 2000  Late Show

Source: Audience
Lineage:  CDR > EAC v.09b4 > WAV > MKW v.97b1 > shn   
Taped by: Unknown
Transferred by: Unknown

File Size: 449mb  shn

Setlist

Disc 1
1. I Am The Man, Thomas (Ralph Stanely/Larry Sparks)
2. My Back Pages
3. Desolation Row
4. Mama, You Been On My Mind
5. This World Can't Stand Long (Jim Anglin)
6 Dignity
7. Country Pie
8. We Better Talk This Over
9. Things Have Changed
10.Not Dark Yet
11.Highway 61 Revisited

Disc 2
1. Ballad Of A Thin Man
2. Not Fade Away  (Norman Petty/Charles Hardin)
3.It Ain't Me, Babe
4. Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat

Live Debut of Country Pie
First rendition of We Better Talk This Over since December 16, 1978  Hollywood, Florida
Only the second Street Legal song performed on the Neverending Tour!!
